channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Looking to the history of U.S.-Iran relations to understand the future
item.description: In many ways, the conflict between Iran and the U.S. and Israel has been decades in the making. Ramtin Arablouei, host of NPR's podcast "Throughline," explains how.
item.content:encoded: In many ways, the conflict between Iran and the U.S. and Israel has been decades in the making. Ramtin Arablouei, host of NPR's podcast "Throughline," explains how.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Hodges

item.title: Democratic Sen. Mark Warner describes intelligence on Iran
item.description: Sen. Mark Warner, Democrat of Virginia and the ranking member of the Senate Intelligence Committee, talks about his response to U.S. strikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded: Sen. Mark Warner, Democrat of Virginia and the ranking member of the Senate Intelligence Committee, talks about his response to U.S. strikes on Iran.
item.dc:creator: Emily Kwong

item.title: How war in Iran could impact global energy markets
item.description: The U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, a major oil producer, threatens to impact oil and natural gas markets worldwide.
item.content:encoded: The U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, a major oil producer, threatens to impact oil and natural gas markets worldwide.
item.dc:creator: Julia Simon

item.title: Iranians in Los Angeles react to the strikes on Iran
item.description: The Iranian diaspora in Los Angeles has celebrated the Trump administration's strikes against Iran, but some have mixed feelings.
item.content:encoded: The Iranian diaspora in Los Angeles has celebrated the Trump administration's strikes against Iran, but some have mixed feelings.
item.dc:creator: Kelly McEvers

item.title: What is the U.S. military's capacity to carry out extended strikes in Iran?
item.description: Seth Jones of the center for Strategic and International Studies talks about the U.S military's capacity to carry out extended strikes in Iran, and Iran's ability to retaliate.
item.content:encoded: Seth Jones of the center for Strategic and International Studies talks about the U.S military's capacity to carry out extended strikes in Iran, and Iran's ability to retaliate.
item.dc:creator: Kai McNamee

item.title: Iranian spokesperson says country has 'no other choice' but to fight back
item.description: Esmail Baghaei, spokeman for Iran's Foreign Ministry, talks about his country's response to U.S. and Israeli airstrikes.
item.content:encoded: Esmail Baghaei, spokeman for Iran's Foreign Ministry, talks about his country's response to U.S. and Israeli airstrikes.
item.dc:creator: Emily Kwong

item.title: Texas Rep. Tony Gonzales faces primary challenge amid allegations of affair
item.description: Caught in controversy, Republican Rep. Tony Gonzales faces a tough primary challenge as his voters weigh whether to back him again in Tuesday's primary.
item.content:encoded: Caught in controversy, Republican Rep. Tony Gonzales faces a tough primary challenge as his voters weigh whether to back him again in Tuesday's primary.
item.dc:creator: David Martin Davies

item.title: U.S.-Israeli war with Iran continues as 3 American troops are killed
item.description: Three U.S. service members have been killed in ongoing operations in the Middle East, as U.S. and Israeli strikes continue to hit Iran and Iran responds with waves of missiles and drones across the region.
item.content:encoded: Three U.S. service members have been killed in ongoing operations in the Middle East, as U.S. and Israeli strikes continue to hit Iran and Iran responds with waves of missiles and drones across the region.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Kahn

item.title: How some Iranians reacted to attacks on their country
item.description: What are people in Iran saying about today's attacks by the U.S. and Israel? We hear from people on the ground who experienced the event as it unfolded.
item.content:encoded: What are people in Iran saying about today's attacks by the U.S. and Israel? We hear from people on the ground who experienced the event as it unfolded.
item.dc:creator: Henry Larson

item.title: House Dem. Leader Jeffries responds to air strikes on Iran by U.S. and Israel
item.description: NPR's Emily Kwong speaks to House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY), who is still calling for a vote on a war powers resolution following a wave of U.S.- and Israel-led airstrikes on Iran.
item.content:encoded:
NPR's Emily Kwong speaks to House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY), who is still calling for a vote on a war powers resolution following a wave of U.S.- and Israel-led airstrikes on Iran.

(Image credit: Win McNamee)
item.dc:creator: Emily Kwong
